title: requests — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: OpenTelemetry / Prometheus metrics this module emits. RED pattern for the submit + approve + reject surfaces; funnel counters mirror events.json + analytics.json but at the ops / SLO level (not gated by user consent).

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.grant_issued.total
metrics.description: Increments on AccessRequestGrantIssued. Difference vs approved.total = number of orphaned approvals (materialisation failures).

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.grant_materialisation_failed.total
metrics.description: Increments when AccessRequestGrantMaterializer raises. Alerts fire above 1 per hour — orphaned approvals block requesters.

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.pending
metrics.description: Point-in-time count of pending access requests. Sampled every 60s.

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.pending_by_approver
metrics.description: Per-approver backlog. Feeds the 'approver overload' dashboard — an approver with 15+ pending requests likely needs delegation help.

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.submit.duration_ms
metrics.description: POST /access-requests end-to-end — covers validation + approver resolution + approval_instance creation.

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.approver_resolution.duration_ms
metrics.description: AccessRequestApproverResolver step timings. `resolver_step` = template_match | fallback_selector | resource_owner_fallback. Slow template matching signals rule complexity growth.

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.time_to_decision_hours
metrics.description: Time from submission to terminal decision. `outcome` = approved | rejected | expired | cancelled. SLO target: p50 < 8h for approved, p95 < 48h.

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.approval_rate
metrics.description: Rolling 30d (approved / (approved + rejected + expired)). SLO target: > 0.5 for a healthy tenant — lower rates suggest a mismatch between roles and expected work.

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.request_hint_offered.total
metrics.description: Incremented by `access.request_hint_on_denial` middleware every time it enriches a 403. High volume on a specific resource_type signals a role assignment gap for tenants.

metrics.name: academorix.access_requests.orphaned_approvals.gauge
metrics.description: Approved approval_instances without a materialised grant. Non-zero for more than 1 hour pages on-call.
